the neon slums.description: This district stretches far beneath the towering megacorporate skyscrapers, packed with densely stacked, crumbling buildings illuminated by flickering neon signs advertising everything from body mods to back-alley VR hacks. The streets are filled with the hum of malfunctioning cybernetic limbs and the buzzing of drones constantly surveilling the populace. The air smells like burned plastic and stale industrial exhaust. Shantytown structures made of scavenged tech and augmented steel stand side by side with VR cafes and illegal augmentation shops. Common Objects: Discarded cybernetic limbs, cheap VR headsets, knock-off body enhancement kits, and graffiti-covered ad drones. Regular Activities: Illegal body mods, black market VR access, and hacktivist meetups plotting against the corporations. People here often engage in VR dives where they attempt to explore the darkest corners of virtual worlds, many of them dangerous or corrupted by hostile AIs.
